name: Herbed Yogurt Cheese
recipeIngredient: 1 scallion, cleaned and finely minced (1 tbsp.)
1 small clove garlic, peeled and crushed (1/2 tsp.)
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the yogurt in a fine strainer set over a bowl and refrigerate it for 8 hours to allow the moisture to drain out.
2. Discard the liquid. Place the yogurt in a mixing bowl. Add the green onion, parsley, garlic, pepper, and salt. Mix well.
3. Transfer the mixture to a 12-inch square piece of cheesecloth. Gather up the edges so that the mixture forms a ball. Tie the cloth together and refrigerate until ready to serve.
When ready to serve, unwrap the cheese, invert onto a plate, and serve with toast, crackers, or bread. Serves 4.
